sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53180" key="ka/pnisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάπν-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n53180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">offering of smoke</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incense,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.174.5</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
